page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Typing Hokan Keikaku
text:
is a video game first released on 20 July 20, 2000 for the Windows, and on 31 August 2001 for the . It is a typing game based on the TV series. It was developed and published by GAINAX.

Overview

It is a game that teaches typing during the course of the different levels. It was necessary to use the Dreamcast keyboard to play. It offers several short performances that show some scenes and events of the series. All the player has to do is type the words that appear on the screen as quickly as possible, on his keyboard. These words can be in romaji, kana, and finally in kanji, this option being much more difficult than the others.
